title: Architecture
summary: Tiered architecture from POC modular monolith to target microservices.

blocks.heading: Tiered deployment strategy
blocks.content: Logical service boundaries are defined upfront. Physical deployment starts as a modular monolith for pilot speed, decomposing at M8 when scale or isolation requires it.
bullets: POC — Single FastAPI or ASP.NET app + demo UI (rapid iteration)
Pilot MVP — Modular monolith + managed PostgreSQL (current .NET path)
Production — API Gateway + microservices + event bus + full observability

blocks.heading: Data flow
blocks.content: Equipment and sensors → telematics providers → provider adapters → canonical telemetry → analytics and AI engine → alerts and dashboards. Failed records are quarantined for replay; data quality is scored.
